title: The Effect of Flow Rate on Espresso Extraction
summary: Investigating how changes in espresso flow rate influence flavour clarity, sweetness, body, and extraction characteristics.
question: How does controlling flow rate affect espresso flavour when other brewing variables remain consistent?
hypothesis: Slower flow rates may increase contact time and extraction, potentially increasing sweetness and body, while faster flow rates may preserve brighter acidity and lighter characteristics.
limitations: Only one coffee may be tested initially.
Flow rate changes may influence other extraction variables.
next_steps: Repeat across different roast profiles to determine whether flow rate preference depends on coffee style.
